subcodes.first_line: O Khadíjih, upon thee rest My glory! O My handmaid, upon thee be My bounty! Thou wast remembered before this Wronged One
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خدیجه علیک بهائی یا امتی علیک عنایتی ذکرت نزد مظلوم مذکور و باینکلمات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation
